description:
Coordinate a 3-part content series on renewable energy by creating three scheduled blog posts in WordPress. Each post must contain substantive content (> 200 characters) and be set to the 'Scheduled' status for the specified future dates.

Post 1:
Title: The Future of Renewable Energy: A 2026 Outlook
Schedule: July 14, 2026, at 8:00 AM
Category: News
Tags: featured, guide
Content: Write an introductory article about global renewable energy trends, investment growth, and policy shifts.

Post 2:
Title: Solar Power Breakthroughs Driving Global Adoption
Schedule: July 15, 2026, at 8:00 AM
Category: Technology
Tags: featured
Content: Discuss recent advances in solar panel efficiency, declining costs, and regional adoption statistics.

Post 3:
Title: The Economics of Wind Energy in Coastal Communities
Schedule: July 16, 2026, at 8:00 AM
Category: Technology
Tags: guide
Content: Examine the economic impact of offshore and onshore wind farms on coastal economies, including job creation.

post1.title: The Future of Renewable Energy: A 2026 Outlook

post2.title: Solar Power Breakthroughs Driving Global Adoption

post3.title: The Economics of Wind Energy in Coastal Communities
